form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 10 at Eagle Farm Shoot Out Qlty January 3 over 2100m, soft track; 6 len behind Sun Worshipper carrying 53kg at $9. form.formComment: Second run back.
